objective: Extended adult HCC evidence subset that keeps live accession-backed transcriptomics cohorts and adds a large resolved tumor-versus-adjacent liver microarray series without changing the stricter first-wave core.
inclusion_principles: Prefer adult hepatocellular carcinoma cohorts with explicit tumor versus liver comparator definitions in public accession metadata.
Allow adjacent non-tumor liver comparators in the extended subset when the accession exposes a direct adult-HCC design and usable sample-level matrices.
Keep this subset separate from the first-wave benchmark core so broader HCC evidence does not silently change benchmark claims.

included_datasets.reason: Adult HCC tissue cohort with explicit case/control counts in the accession design and a live accession-backed microarray loader.
Paired adult HCC cohort with explicit accession-level counts and a live accession-backed microarray loader.
RNA-seq cohort with explicit paired tumor-normal counts and a live accession-backed expression-workbook loader.
Large adult HCC microarray cohort with explicit GEO tissue labels and a live accession-backed Illumina platform mapping path.

excluded_datasets.reason: Comparator arm is adjacent liver from colorectal liver metastasis cases rather than a clean adult-HCC adjacent or healthy liver control.
Mixed HDV-HCC, HCV-HCC, HBV-HCC, and cirrhosis cohort rather than a clean adult HCC benchmark.
Treatment-naive multiregional HCC study with unresolved per-arm counts in the retrieved public metadata.
Public GDC project arms are useful for later expansion, but this extended subset is limited to current live accession-backed transcriptomics loaders.

notes: This is an exploratory PrioriTx subset for broader live adult-HCC transcriptomics evidence and is not the same as the stricter first-wave benchmark core.
